subject: Escalation: apollo blockers for Canberra | Albert Einstein | Q3 review | INIT-8417
body: Please note the apollo stream in Canberra has shifted to a tighter timeline. Current status is review with monthly updates owned by delivery. Review dependencies across operations and flag unresolved risks. Prepare a fallback plan if integration testing slips beyond schedule. The retrospective section links this stream to lessons from Albert Einstein and Amelia Earhart. Reference initiative INIT-8417. Please add your comments before tomorrow morning. Tracking tags: planning, ops.
